title: pratia nummularia
intro: Pratia nummularia, also known as blue starflower, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. In herbal preparations, Pratia nummularia is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its potential benefits.
